creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
On 17:49 04-Apr 2014 Volodymyr Kostyrko wrote:
> Hello.
> 
> I object on this one. Right now it's synchronized with 
> net-im/tkabber-devel. I tried to contact tkabber-devel maintainer about 
> spawning tkabber-devel-plugins but to no avail.
> 
> I sent him one more email, I think if he wouldn't respond in... say, one 
> week or so I'll be ready to accept this one.

Hello.

net-im/tkabber-devel port is ancient SVN snapshot, it was needed because
6 years passed between two consequent releases (0.11.1 and 1.0),
although developers were rather active in SVN repo.

I'd like to propose to deprecate/delete net-im/tkabber-devel port, since
after release it's not needed anymore and master_site (which is the same
domain as maintainer's email) is not available.
